response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior software engineer, but the resume shows no professional C++ development experience beyond a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. The role demands 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, strong SQL Server/Oracle experience, and capital markets/fixed-income domain knowledge — none of which are evidenced. Primary stacks are JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no investment banking exposure.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Brief prior C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
concerns: Lacks the required 5-10 years of professional C++ on Windows; only ~6 months total C/C++ exposure
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience anywhere on the resume
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is MongoDB and generic SQL/MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
